name: Gado Gado
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely shred cabbage and discard the stalk.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of sesame oil in a skillet. Add shredded cabbage, onion, thinly sliced bell pepper, bean sprouts, and chili. Fry over high heat for 3-4 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and spoon the mixture into a serving dish to cool.
3. To make sauce, heat remaining sesame oil in a saucepan. Add garlic, shallots, and cumin. Cook gently for 5 minutes. Stir in peanut butter and cook gently for 2 minutes. Add lemon juice, hot-pepper sauce, and water, then gently heat the mixture through to form a fairly thick sauce.
4. Garnish the sauce with bell pepper strips, if desired, and serve with the cooled vegetables.
